text:
Oh--I got sidetracked. The Ape NFTs are not a thing anymore. That's why I don't like NFTs. Extremely high risk, low probability of yielding a profit. 

So that's why they're not traded like coins. That's what coins are for lol. They have other uses and meanings to people who just want to own them and admire them, or use them in a game they love... An NFT is more like a big Lego set you built all by yourself, or for adults, maybe a drug. Something that doesn't intrinsically have any perceivable use or purpose after you buy it. Its purpose is simply to be admired or played with. It's a toy. An object that you use your imagination to bring to life in your mind's reality!
